title: CAPXEL for SaaS and B2B | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceFind the Decision Makers. Close the Deals.B2B intelligence powered by the deepest consumer and business data layer in the industry.Talk to Our TeamExplore SPYBOXThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.B2B CapabilitiesCompany + stakeholder intelligence, unifiedCAPXEL connects business data, company signals, and decision-maker context so your team can stop chasing unqualified accounts. We're a white-glove data consultancy — we don't do marketing, we empower the teams who do.Company intelligenceFirmographics, company identifiers, and organizational context — aligned to the accounts that matter.Decision-maker signalsLink people to companies and roles so you can target the right stakeholders — not just generic contacts.Revenue indicatorsEmployee count, revenue signals, and growth markers to prioritize accounts by real-world buying capacity.LinkedIn & web resolutionEnrich profiles and entity signals to support outbound, ABM, and AI agent recommendations.Products for SaaSIdentify intent, build exact lists, and get recommended by AI systems.SPYBOXIdentify which companies visit your site — see account-level interest without waiting for a demo request.Learn more PROSPEXBuild exact B2B prospect lists by company attributes and stakeholder filters — then activate across outbound channels.Learn more INSPEXAnalyze your best clients and find the common signals that predict fit — then replicate the pattern at scale.Learn more ASOGet recommended by AI procurement agents. Publish machine-readable trust and product signals aligned with LLM-LD.Learn more B2B IntelligenceFind the right accounts — then win themCAPXEL gives your team the data layer to qualify, prioritize, and activate accounts with confidence.Talk to Our TeamExplore PROSPEXFAQCommon questions from SaaS and B2B teams.Can CAPXEL identify companies visiting my site?Do you provide LinkedIn enrichment?Is this built for ABM and outbound?How do you handle data security?
